scripts.dev:all: docker compose up -d db redis meili && concurrently --names "api,web" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "cd api && cargo run" "pnpm --filter revolution-svelte dev"
scripts.dev:docker: docker compose up -d db redis meili
scripts.dev:docker:stop: docker compose stop db redis meili
scripts.api:lint: cd api && cargo machete && cargo deny check && cargo clippy --locked --all-targets -- -D warnings
